title: Lenovo shares jump 15% on record earnings as AI revenue nearly doubles
description: Shares of Lenovo surged over 15% on Friday, after the electronics giant posted strong revenue growth bolstered by its artificial intelligence business.
content:

title: Trump postpones signing AI security order over parts he disliked

title: Meta layoffs: Viral claim says employees built AI tools just before layoffs began
description: A widely shared social media post has reignited concerns around AI-driven job insecurity after claiming some Meta employees were encouraged to develop internal artificial intelligence tools shortly before layoffs swept through the company. Although the claims remain unconfirmed, the story has amplified wider fears about how AI is reshaping jobs across the tech industry.
